description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI for general build that runs on push to master and tags matching v*, on pull requests to master, and on release creation. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, and macos-latest for both x64 and x86 architectures on Windows. It checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, configures the build for the specific OS, builds, tests, packages, and builds a Python wrapper. The workflow also uploads build artifacts and release assets to GitHub.
